method_notes: Single-platform: 20-shuffle MCCV, ConvNeXt-Tiny 1024px on AI-READI v3.0 Eidon CFP.
Cross-platform: union-trained ConvNeXt-Tiny evaluated on 309 paired subjects across iCare Eidon, Topcon Triton, Optomed Aurora.
Paired bootstrap: subject-level resampling with replacement, 10,000 iterations, seed 20260516.
Steiger Z-test: tests difference between two correlations sharing one variable (here: age target). Two paired correlations evaluated on the same 309 subjects.
Fisher z-test: tests difference between two independent correlations (different cohorts).
